D=1: hillis_steele faster than blelloch for all tested L
  L=1024: 0.8125; L=2048: 0.8235; L=4096: 0.8824; L=8192: 0.8824; L=16384: 0.8333; L=32768: 0.9327; L=65536: 0.9023; L=131072: 0.7906

  L=1024: 0.8750; L=2048: 1.0809; L=4096: 0.8387; L=8192: 0.9237; L=16384: 0.8393; L=32768: 0.7832; L=65536: 0.7295; L=131072: 0.6841
